标题: Racing holds a sacred place in the hearts of almost all men, with the roar of the engine and the surge of adrenaline making them excited. For men, a classic racing watch is indispensable. As the official timepiece of the Renault Formula One team, Bell & Ross perfectly combines the exceptional pursuit of speed, performance, and sports from both sides. Inspired by Renault's latest single-seater race car, the new BR-R.S. watch is launched. This watch features an automatic Swiss mechanical movement, a bezel with a tachymeter scale, a perforated micro-sprayed titanium case, anti-glare sapphire crystal, and a carbon fiber dial. The watch's color scheme draws from Renault's distinctive yellow and iconic red, seamlessly combining racing and watchmaking craftsmanship.

BRF BR- with super strong Suerluminova®C green luminescent numerals and hour markers, the minimalist design and functional dial are perfectly integrated to showcase time clearly. Bell & Ross INSTRUMENTS series BRA automatic mechanical movement, stainless steel case, millimeter with ceramic minute scale unidirectional rotating stainless steel bezel, minute track up to the longest minute, blue sapphire crystal with anti-glare coating, natural rubber strap, stainless steel buckle.

BR Explorer Magazine: The Bremont INSTRUMENTS series BR-BLU-ST/SCA watch features a bronze case paired with a dark brown Italian imported calf leather strap, a unidirectional rotating bezel with minute markers and an aluminum insert, a silver sunburst dial with hour markers coated with Super-LumiNova® luminescent material. The metal skeletonized hour, minute, and second hands are filled with Super-LumiNova® luminescent material, powered by an automatic movement, and measures millimeters.

The Bell & Ross BR Cyber Ceramic is a very avant-garde and unique timepiece, part of the iconic "Cyber" futuristic style series. The case is made of black high-tech steel, known for its high hardness. The dial continues Bell & Ross's minimalist hollow instrument style. The hands and hour markers are coated with Super-LumiNova® luminescent material, emitting a bright green light in the dark for easy reading at night. It is powered by an automatic winding mechanical movement. It is truly a "design-driven" watch, suitable for individuals who seek unique personality, appreciate modern architectural aesthetics, and futuristic sci-fi style. It is more like a wearable miniature sculpture artwork on the wrist.
